member.name: T:Skibidi_Toilet_Beaters.My.Resources.Resources
member.summary: A strongly-typed resource class, for looking up localized strings, etc.

member.name: P:Skibidi_Toilet_Beaters.My.Resources.Resources.ResourceManager
member.summary: Returns the cached ResourceManager instance used by this class.

member.name: P:Skibidi_Toilet_Beaters.My.Resources.Resources.Culture
member.summary: Overrides the current thread's CurrentUICulture property for all resource lookups using this strongly typed resource class.

member.name: P:Skibidi_Toilet_Beaters.My.Resources.Resources.No_Head_Skibidu
member.summary: Looks up a localized resource of type System.Drawing.Bitmap.

member.name: P:Skibidi_Toilet_Beaters.My.Resources.Resources.Ost
member.summary: Looks up a localized resource of type System.IO.UnmanagedMemoryStream similar to System.IO.MemoryStream.

member.name: P:Skibidi_Toilet_Beaters.My.Resources.Resources.Skibidi_Head
member.summary: Looks up a localized resource of type System.Drawing.Bitmap.

member.name: P:Skibidi_Toilet_Beaters.My.Resources.Resources.Skibidi_Head_Canon
member.summary: Looks up a localized resource of type System.Drawing.Bitmap.
